title: Finance Section
subtitleManage: Manage income/expense, student payments, debts, and staff salaries in one place.
subtitleView: Monitor income/expense, student payments, debts, and staff salaries.

cards.studentDebtDesc: Total unpaid amount for current year.
cards.salaryPendingDesc: Unpaid staff salary remainder for this month.

charts.yearlyDesc: Overall financial results for the last 5 years.

transaction.title: Add income or expense
transaction.desc: Sponsorship, grants, and other general income/expense. Use the dedicated forms below for student fees and staff salaries.

studentPayment.title: Add student payment
studentPayment.desc: Record student tuition here — it counts once in statistics and reduces debt.

salaryPayment.title: Staff salary payment
salaryPayment.desc: Record staff salary here — it counts once in expense totals.

yearGrid.title: Annual payment grid
yearGrid.desc: Spreadsheet-style view of each student's monthly payments. Data stays in the database; this is read-only.
yearGrid.empty: No students found for the selected year.
yearGrid.hint: Add payments via the student payment form. The grid is view-only for security.

studentTable.title: Student payments and debt
studentTable.descManage: Manage monthly fee, payments, and current year debt for each student.
studentTable.descView: Monitor monthly fee, payments, and current year debt for each student.
studentTable.empty: No students found for financial monitoring yet.

staffTable.title: Staff salary monitoring
staffTable.descManage: Monitor monthly salary, paid amount, and remaining amount for staff.
staffTable.descView: Review monthly salary, paid amount, and remaining amount for staff.
staffTable.empty: No staff found for financial monitoring yet.

transactions.title: Recent financial records
transactions.descManage: All entered income and expense records are stored here.
transactions.descView: All entered income and expense records are shown here.
transactions.subject: Subject

errors.financeLoadDesc: An error occurred while loading finance section.
errors.transactionSaveDesc: An error occurred while adding transaction.
errors.studentPaymentSaveDesc: An error occurred while saving student payment.
errors.salaryPaymentSaveDesc: An error occurred while saving salary payment.
errors.studentFeeUpdateDesc: An error occurred while saving student monthly fee.
errors.staffSalaryUpdateDesc: An error occurred while saving staff monthly salary.
errors.transactionDeleteDesc: An error occurred while deleting transaction.
